samples.text: A student can study mathematics and also play the piano. Is this logically consistent?
A student studies mathematics and additionally plays piano. Does this make logical sense?
A pupil can learn mathematics and also perform on the piano. Is this logically consistent?
Studying math and playing piano are not mutually exclusive. So both can be true. Is the described situation logically consistent?
A student can study mathematics and also play the piano. Someone left the door open earlier. Is this logically consistent?
